title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMAdvertising
description: Advertising installations from OpenStreetMap tagged with advertising=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMAdvertising

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

advertisingType.description: Property. The OSM advertising tag classifying the installation type. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:advertising'

lit.description: Property. Indicates if the advertising sign is illuminated. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:lit'

operator.description: Property. The name of the organization operating the advertising sign.

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
